creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
<https://www.freebsd.org/administration/#t-secteam> describes the Security Team with one Security Officer. No mention of: 

    security-officer@

– or the Security Officer Team.

<https://www.freebsd.org/security/charter/#_3_authorities> it's essentially one person ("He"), then there's security-officer@ (a list) and the Security Officer Team. 

The Security Officer Team is also mentioned under <https://www.freebsd.org/security/#reporting>. 

----

The administration page can be improved by not omitting the Security Officer Team.
